description: Resource utilization dashboard for Redpanda showing CPU, memory, and disk I/O metrics

panels.description: Host metrics configuration info per shard
panels.title: Host Metrics Info

panels.description: IOTune-detected disk read/write rates per instance
panels.title: IO Properties

panels.description: Cloud instance type and estimated host capacity per instance
panels.title: Instance Info

panels.description: Maximum utilization across all resource types (reactor, IO queue, memory, connections, disk IOPS, network)
panels.title: Highest Load Factor

panels.description: Highest reactor utilization across all nodes and shards
panels.title: Reactor / CPU

panels.description: Highest IO queue consumption across all nodes
panels.title: IO Scheduler

panels.description: Highest data-disk read IOPS vs host capacity across all nodes
panels.title: Disk Read IOPS

panels.description: Highest data-disk write IOPS vs host capacity across all nodes
panels.title: Disk Write IOPS

panels.description: Highest memory usage across all nodes, scaled so 100 means available memory is down to 10% of total

targets.expr: max(100 * (sum by ($instance_label) (vectorized_memory_total_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"}) - sum by ($instance_label) (vectorized_memory_available_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"})) / (0.9 * sum by ($instance_label) (vectorized_memory_total_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"})))

panels.title: Available Memory

panels.description: Highest connection load factor across all nodes

targets.expr: max(100 * sum by ($instance_label) (vectorized_kafka_rpc_active_connections{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"}) / ((1000 * (sum by ($instance_label) (vectorized_memory_allocated_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"} + vectorized_memory_free_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"}) / (1024 * 1024 * 1024))) - clamp_min((1000 * (sum by ($instance_label) (vectorized_memory_allocated_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"} + vectorized_memory_free_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"}) / (1024 * 1024 * 1024))) - (3000 * count by ($instance_label) (vectorized_memory_allocated_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"})), 0)))

panels.title: Connections

panels.description: Highest inbound network vs host NIC bandwidth across all nodes
panels.title: Net RX

panels.description: Highest outbound network vs host NIC bandwidth across all nodes
panels.title: Net TX

panels.description: Maximum reactor utilization per node (highest shard)
panels.title: Reactor Utilization by Instance

panels.description: Per-shard reactor utilization (load factor) for each instance
panels.title: Reactor Utilization by Shard

panels.description: Per-shard CPU utilization (0-100 range)
panels.title: CPU Utilization by Shard

panels.description: Average CPU utilization across all shards per instance
panels.title: CPU Utilization by Instance

panels.description: Rate of tasks processed per second
panels.title: Task Processing Rate

1.text: These metrics will be uniformly zero since this system isn't using IO properties

panels.description: IO queue consumption per node (sum of shards)
panels.title: IO Queue Consumption by Instance

panels.description: Per-shard, per-class IO queue consumption (load factor) for each instance
panels.title: IO Queue Consumption by Shard

panels.description: IO queue consumption rate per instance and class (summed across shards)
panels.title: IO Queue Consumption

panels.description: Operations sitting in the IO scheduler queue, not yet submitted to the kernel (time-integrated counter; rate gives the average queued depth, summed across shards per instance and class)
panels.title: IO Queue Length

panels.description: Rate of disk I/O operations per second per instance and class
panels.title: IO Queue Operations Rate

panels.description: Rate of bytes transferred to/from disk per second per instance and class
panels.title: IO Queue Bytes Throughput

panels.description: Operations that have left the IO scheduler and been submitted to the kernel but not yet reaped (time-integrated counter; rate gives the average in-flight depth, summed across shards per instance and class)
panels.title: Disk Queue Length

panels.description: Data-disk read IOPS per instance from host diskstats, with the instance read IOPS capacity as a dotted line
panels.title: Read IOPS (host)

panels.description: Data-disk read bytes/s per instance from host diskstats
panels.title: Read Bytes (host)

panels.description: Average data-disk read IO size (bytes per operation) per instance, from host diskstats
panels.title: Read IO Size (host)

panels.description: Seastar AIO read IOPS per instance
panels.title: Read IOPS (aio)

panels.description: Seastar AIO read bytes/s per instance
panels.title: Read Bytes (aio)

panels.description: Average seastar AIO read IO size (bytes per operation) per instance
panels.title: Read IO Size (aio)

panels.description: Data-disk write IOPS per instance from host diskstats, with the instance write IOPS capacity as a dotted line
panels.title: Write IOPS (host)

panels.description: Data-disk write bytes/s per instance from host diskstats
panels.title: Write Bytes (host)

panels.description: Average data-disk write IO size (bytes per operation) per instance, from host diskstats
panels.title: Write IO Size (host)

panels.description: Seastar AIO write IOPS per instance
panels.title: Write IOPS (aio)

panels.description: Seastar AIO write bytes/s per instance
panels.title: Write Bytes (aio)

panels.description: Average seastar AIO write IO size (bytes per operation) per instance
panels.title: Write IO Size (aio)

panels.description: Segment-appender disk writes completed per second per instance
panels.title: Write IOPS (appender)

panels.description: Segment-appender bytes written per second per instance
panels.title: Write Bytes (appender)

panels.description: Average segment-appender write size (bytes per write) per instance
panels.title: Write IO Size (appender)

panels.description: Segment-appender append requests per second per instance (before merging/splitting into disk writes)
panels.title: Write IOPS (requested)

panels.description: Segment-appender bytes requested per second per instance
panels.title: Write Bytes (requested)

panels.description: Average requested append size (bytes per request) per instance
panels.title: Write IO Size (requested)

panels.description: Available-memory load factor per node
panels.title: Available Memory Load Factor by Instance

panels.description: Per-instance memory totals and available-memory load factor
panels.title: Memory by Instance

panels.description: Lowest available memory across shards per instance, with the per-shard total memory budget as a dotted line
panels.title: Available Memory by Instance

panels.description: Available memory per shard, with the per-shard total memory budget as a dotted line (one per instance)
panels.title: Available Memory by Shard

panels.description: Kafka connection load factor per node

targets.expr: max by ($instance_label) (100 * sum by ($instance_label) (vectorized_kafka_rpc_active_connections{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"}) / ((1000 * (sum by ($instance_label) (vectorized_memory_allocated_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"} + vectorized_memory_free_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"}) / (1024 * 1024 * 1024))) - clamp_min((1000 * (sum by ($instance_label) (vectorized_memory_allocated_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"} + vectorized_memory_free_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"}) / (1024 * 1024 * 1024))) - (3000 * count by ($instance_label) (vectorized_memory_allocated_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"})), 0)))

panels.title: Connection Load Factor by Instance

panels.description: Active Kafka connections vs the calculated per-node limit

targets.expr: 100 * sum by ($instance_label) (vectorized_kafka_rpc_active_connections{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"}) / ((1000 * (sum by ($instance_label) (vectorized_memory_allocated_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"} + vectorized_memory_free_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"}) / (1024 * 1024 * 1024))) - clamp_min((1000 * (sum by ($instance_label) (vectorized_memory_allocated_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"} + vectorized_memory_free_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"}) / (1024 * 1024 * 1024))) - (3000 * count by ($instance_label) (vectorized_memory_allocated_memory{$instance_label=~"$instance_value"})), 0))

panels.title: Connection Details

panels.description: Currently active Kafka RPC connections per shard (limit: min(3000/shard, 1000/GiB of memory))
panels.title: Active Kafka Connections by Shard

title: Redpanda - Load Factor
